code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test01-JAN-2025Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows hypoglycemia, low HbA1c, elevated creatinine, mild metabolic acidosis (low CO2), and significant proteinuria with ketonuria and glucosuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity. These findings suggest possible acute or chronic kidney dysfunction, poor glycemic control (possibly malnutrition or overtreatment), and possible dehydration or infection. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.

coding.display: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
